name: local-llama-server
description: Points at a llama-server running a Mycroft Qwen journalist fine-tune (abliterated, GGUF). Cross-platform — runs on macOS (Apple Silicon or Intel), Linux, Windows. Zero network egress. Start with: `llama-server -m <path-to-gguf> -c 32768 --port 8080`. Models downloaded from Hugging Face — see the 9B for most hardware, 35B for 64GB+ machines.
